content.adaptationQuestion.q_ip1_keep_st: the base keyboard's recognized input-strategy fingerprint
content.adaptationQuestion.q_ip2_keep_de: the base keyboard's device targets vs the ones you declared
content.adaptationQuestion.q_ip3_keep_sc: the base keyboard's neutral-residue script conventions
content.adaptationQuestion.q_sa1_target_: scripts used by existing keyboards for related languages
content.adaptationQuestion.q_sa2_base_sc: the base keyboard's own script vs the script you chose
content.adaptationQuestion.q_tp2_fallbac: whether fallback-tier bases may prefill (default: allowed, always marked)
content.adaptationQuestion.q_tp3_orthogr: alternate-script keyboards for related languages in a known family
